surfaceRequirements.reason: The carbon allotropes comparison has generated inquiry/lab candidates, but no reviewed lab-safe runtime reaction or animation scope is approved for src/data/reactions.json in this workflow slice.

The current story runtime in src/modules/storyMode.js reads element-level stories from elements/story media, not curriculum-topic story records, so no topic story runtime target exists without rewriting the story engine.
